Footer.reachOut: Have a sourcing question? Talk to our team — we'll be glad to help.

Enquiry.heading: Tell us what you're sourcing.
Enquiry.sub: Share your requirement and our team responds with specs, pricing, and a sample — usually within one business day.
Enquiry.trust1: Spec sheets, COA & documentation on request

hero.heading: A trusted bridge between Indian growers and global buyers.
hero.sub: Premium agricultural and food ingredients — sourced and processed in India, exported with the documentation and care global trade demands.

intro.heading: A broad-spectrum food-ingredient partner, built on trust.
intro.body: Traya International Exim LLP is a dynamic, globally oriented export house delivering premium agricultural and food-processing products from India to international markets. We work with certified production facilities and quality-controlled supply chains, so every shipment meets international food-safety standards and your exact specification.
intro.vision: To become a globally recognised leader in premium agricultural exports, connecting the finest products of India with food industries and consumers across the world.
intro.mission: To promote Indian agricultural excellence through reliable, precise, relationship-first export solutions, built on quality, consistency, and trust.
intro.spec: India origin · Bulk & custom packaging · Global export

groups.heading: Eighteen categories, one accountable partner.
groups.sub: From dehydrated alliums to spray-dried powders, spices, herbs, and premium wellness lines. Browse by what you make.
groups.alliumsBlurb: Onion and garlic in every cut and grade, plus dehydrated vegetables.
groups.powdersBlurb: Fruit and vegetable powders, from mango and tomato to coconut milk.
groups.spicesBlurb: Turmeric, cumin, and chilli, plus ready snack seasonings.
groups.herbsBlurb: Oregano, basil, thyme, rosemary, and kasuri methi.
groups.nutraceuticalBlurb: Moringa, spirulina, ashwagandha, amla, and other superfoods.
groups.wellnessBlurb: Dairy powders, A2 ghee, cold-pressed oils, and millets.

why.heading: The discipline of a trading house, the care of a founder.
why.catalogueBody: Not a single-commodity exporter. Find the exact grade, cut, and form you need across 18 categories.
why.founderBody: You deal with people who answer personally and stay accountable from first enquiry to final delivery.
why.docsBody: Spec sheets, COA, and certified, quality-controlled supply chains, so your goods clear customs and perform.
why.logisticsBody: Competitive pricing, international-standard packaging, and timely shipment to your market.

certs.heading: Credentials global buyers can verify.
certs.sub: Registered and recognised across India's key food-export authorities.

process.heading: From first enquiry to delivered cargo.
process.sub: A simple, transparent path — no guesswork, no surprises.
process.step1Body: Tell us what you need — product, grade, volume, and destination. We respond within one business day.
process.step2Body: We send specs, a COA, and a representative sample, with clear FOB / CIF pricing and packaging options.
process.step3Body: On approval, we produce, document, and dispatch — with full export paperwork and tracking to your port.

faq.heading: What buyers ask first.
faq.moqQ: What are your minimum order quantities?
faq.moqA: MOQs vary by product and packaging — typically from one pallet to a full container (FCL). Tell us your target volume and we'll confirm the MOQ and the best packaging for your market.
faq.samplesQ: Can I get a sample before ordering?
faq.samplesA: Yes. We provide a representative sample with a COA for evaluation — just request one with your enquiry.
faq.leadtimeQ: What are your typical lead times?
faq.leadtimeA: Most orders ship within 2–4 weeks of confirmation, depending on product, volume, and documentation. We confirm a firm timeline with every quote.
faq.paymentQ: Which Incoterms and payment terms do you offer?
faq.paymentA: We work on FOB and CIF terms and accept T/T and L/C. Exact terms are confirmed per order and destination.
faq.packagingQ: Do you offer custom or private-label packaging?
faq.packagingA: Yes — bulk, retail, and private-label packaging to your specification, compliant with your destination's labelling rules.
faq.certsQ: Which certifications and documents do you provide?
faq.certsA: FSSAI, APEDA, and Spice Board registrations, plus a per-shipment COA and full export documentation. Region-specific certifications are available on request.

founderSection.heading: Built by someone who shows up.
founderSection.body: Traya is led by Neha Pardeshi, a founder who believes trade is, first, a relationship. Every partnership begins with a conversation and is held to one standard: precision, honesty, and care, shipment after shipment.

finalCta.heading: Ready to source from India?
finalCta.sub: Bulk volumes, custom packaging, full documentation. Tell us what you need and we will respond within one business day.

meta.title: About
meta.description: Traya International Exim LLP — a founder-led global trade house built on precision, partnership, and genuine care for every relationship.

hero.heading: Building partnerships across continents.
hero.tagline: A refined approach to global trade.
hero.body: A global trade firm built for businesses that think beyond borders — pairing operational precision with a deep international network. We believe trade is not just the movement of goods, but the alignment of timing, trust, and purpose.

founder.heading: Trade is, first, a relationship.
founder.name: Neha Pardeshi
founder.p1: The world didn't open up to me through textbooks — it opened up through travel. Exploring different cultures, meeting people from all walks of life, and seeing the world through different perspectives shaped not only who I am, but also what I chose to build.
founder.p2: I've always believed that global trade is ultimately about human connection. Behind every shipment, every product, and every partnership is a relationship built on trust and understanding — something no algorithm or automation can truly replace.
founder.p3: At Traya International EXIM, our goal is not simply to facilitate trade, but to build meaningful and lasting relationships across borders — relationships that grow stronger with every transaction and every conversation.
founder.p4: What began as a passion for exploring the world has evolved into a business driven by commitment, integrity, and a truly global vision. And we are only just getting started.

principles.heading: Discipline and care, in every engagement.
principles.body: What defines us isn't the breadth of our reach, but the discipline and care behind every engagement — held to three founding standards.
principles.p1Body: In planning and execution — every detail considered before it matters.
principles.p2Body: In delivery and conduct — the same standard, shipment after shipment.
principles.p3Body: In every association — relationships held to one honest standard.

philosophy.heading: Sustainable trade, built on four foundations.
philosophy.body: These are not values we display — they are the standards we hold ourselves to in every engagement.
philosophy.f1Body: Knowing precisely where and how to operate.

why.heading: Most trade firms offer a process. We offer a partnership.
why.body: Traya was built on one idea — that trade should be handled with integrity and genuine care, from the first conversation to the final delivery.
why.w1Body: Every process and partnership reflects the values this company was built on.
why.w2Body: Clear systems that remove friction at every stage of the trade cycle.
why.w3Body: Built for the long term, not the single transaction.
why.w4Body: International reach backed by a human, relationship-led approach.
why.w5Body: A diversified catalogue across categories — sourced, handled, and shipped by a single accountable team.
why.w6Body: Spec sheets, COA, and compliant, quality-controlled supply chains, so your goods clear customs and perform.
why.w7Body: Clear pricing, honest timelines, and proactive updates — you always know where your order stands.

vision.vision: To become the most trusted and largest trading partner for businesses expanding across borders.
vision.m1: Facilitate efficient, well-structured trade operations across global markets.
vision.m2: Build lasting international partnerships grounded in reliability, transparency, and mutual growth.
vision.m3: Expand global presence through strategic market engagement and disciplined execution.
vision.commitment: We are not building a firm of isolated transactions. We are building a trade partner you can count on — across borders, across time zones, and across years.

meta.title: Contact
meta.description: Get in touch with Traya International Exim — email, phone, WhatsApp, or send an enquiry. We respond within one business day.

hero.heading: Let's start a conversation.
hero.body: Reach us directly below, or send an enquiry with your requirement — our team responds within one business day.
